TERRAIN_DESC_RUGGED: Slows wheeled vehicles and somewhat slows tracked vehicles.
TERRAIN_DESC_PRECIPITOUS: Allows only commandos. Severe movement cost.
TERRAIN_DESC_EXTRACTABLE: Resources can be extracted from this tile.
TERRAIN_DESC_TRICKY_WATERS: Severly slows massive ships and slows all other units.
TERRAIN_DESC_COVER: Damage to non-air units is reduced by 10%.
TERRAIN_DESC_CAMOUFLAGE: Damage to ground units is reduced by 20%.
TERRAIN_DESC_NAVAL_CAMOUFLAGE: Damage to sea units is reduced by 20%.
TERRAIN_DESC_BUNKER: Damage to ground units is reduced by 40%.
TERRAIN_DESC_GARRISON: Damage to non-air units is reduced by 50%.
TERRAIN_DESC_SHALLOW: Large hulled ships cannot enter shallow waters.
TERRAIN_DESC_DANGEROUS: Does 20 damage to any non-air unit at the start of each turn.
TERRAIN_DESC_SHIELDED: Units are protected from ranged attacks.
TILE_DESC_GRASS: Plains slow movement slighty but provide minimal cover against enemy attacks.
TILE_DESC_FOREST: Forests slow wheeled and tracked units, but will provide cover from attacks.
TILE_DESC_HILL: Hills provide additional range to ranged units.
TILE_DESC_MOUNTAIN: Mountains provide exceptional cover but are very hard to cross.
TILE_DESC_CANYON: Canyons protect non-air units from ranged attacks.
TILE_DESC_VOLCANO: None may pass the treacherous volcano.
TILE_DESC_RICH_ORE: Extractors can extract 500 [Cash] from this tile.
TILE_DESC_USED_ORE: Extractors can extract 300 [Cash] from this tile.
TILE_DESC_DEPLETED_ORE: Nothing else can be extracted from this tile.
TILE_DESC_ROAD: Roads allow for quick movement, but provide no defensive cover.
TILE_DESC_BRIDGE: Bridges are useful for connecting lands, but they lack defensive cover.
TILE_DESC_SEA: The open sea form the theater for naval combat.
TILE_DESC_RIVER: A relatively narrow body of flowing water, and the bane of every invader in history.
TILE_DESC_SHORE: Shores are the link between the land and sea. Order a Leviathan to pick ground troops up.
TILE_DESC_ISLAND: A cluster of small islands providing some defensive cover at the cost of mobility.
TILE_DESC_SWIRL: Reefs slow movement and improve defense against attacks.
TILE_DESC_ROCKS: Rocks provide heavy defensive cover but will damage units that rest on them.
TILE_DESC_WASTELAND: Wastelands are dangerous but they provide massive defensive bonuses.
ENTITY_DESC_ANTI_TANK: Armor-piercing artillery designed to wreck tanks.
ENTITY_DESC_CONSTRUCTION: Ad-hoc fortifications are being erected here.
ENTITY_DESC_LIGHT_INFANTRY: Lightly equipped and almost untrained, these men aren't the best for combat, but they're easy to pump out.
ENTITY_DESC_INFANTRY: The backbone of every army. Reliable, durable and most importantly, cheap.
ENTITY_DESC_ASSAULT_INFANTRY: Well trained, well equipped and ready for your command.
ENTITY_DESC_SNIPERS: Raised in the harsh taigas of Transkal, these men had to hunt to survive. Very good in rugged terrain.
ENTITY_DESC_HEAVY_SNIPER: These sniper wield anti-materiel rifles to combat the strongest of armor.
ENTITY_DESC_MARINES: Trained to attack and overrun beaches or rivers quickly. Capable of fighting on water as on land.
ENTITY_DESC_STORMTROOPERS: Well-trained veterans of the Akkadian War and well equipped with long-range weapons.
ENTITY_DESC_SPEC_OPS: These men are trained to infiltrate enemy lines and sabotage their infrastructure.
ENTITY_DESC_GUARDS: Having endured the most brutal training and education, they are ready to die for the nation.
ENTITY_DESC_PALADIN: The best of the best white guards become paladins, supersoldiers with terrific skill, courage and weaponry.
ENTITY_DESC_STRIKE_COMMANDO: Enemy Commandos and Trucks fear the property-capturing Strike Commando.
ENTITY_DESC_HEAVY_COMMANDO: Heavies like to engage tanks and capture properties.
ENTITY_DESC_SPIDER_TANK: The Spider Tank stuns its target to avoid counter attacks.
ENTITY_DESC_SUICIDE_BOMBER: These men literally throw lives away to thwart heavy tanks. Desperate, but efficient.
ENTITY_DESC_INFANTRY_TRUCK: Much faster than normal infantrymen, they are good if you want to occupy a lot of structures quickly.
ENTITY_DESC_SUPPLY_TRUCK: As if anyone had a doubt logistics win wars, this little fella is deceptively terrifying in the hands of a competent commander
ENTITY_DESC_ASEKARA_TANK: Standardized, easy to produce and easy to deploy, the Asekara Tank is the most cost-effective armored vehicle.
ENTITY_DESC_CRAB_TANK: The Crab cannot be stopped even by water. It can just as well fight in both environments.
ENTITY_DESC_COCKROACH: An annoying little bugger that can be mass-produced to piss off the enemy for good
ENTITY_DESC_BOLT_TANK: Extremely fast, fragile and ferocious against enemy infantry.
ENTITY_DESC_FLAK_TANK: Adapted to prevent enemy air supremacy, the Flak Tank shreds through aircraft.
ENTITY_DESC_TANK_HUNTER: Cleverly designed to destroy enemy tanks effectively, and be hard to destroy in return.
ENTITY_DESC_AMPAC: Incapable of making big tanks, Elam has considered to specialize them for action in rugged terrain.
ENTITY_DESC_AYIN: Forbidden technology; it shoots a neutron flux frontwards, irradiating scores of enemies. Its use will likely only be lawful for a decade or so.
ENTITY_DESC_GORLITZ_TANK: The Gorlitz Tank is powerful but plagued with inadequacies.
ENTITY_DESC_KOSCHEI: The pinnacle of Kargit engineering and Blitzkrieg doctrine, a wehrb's wet dream.
ENTITY_DESC_ENTWICKLUNG: Improving upon the Koschei's advantages and compensating its shortcomings; the ultimate main battle tank.
ENTITY_DESC_ENTWICKLUNG_MK2: Forbidden prototype. This tank deals massive damage but overheats easily.
ENTITY_DESC_IMPERTERRITUS: The Imperterritus is as terrifying to face as it is invulnerable to most weapons.
ENTITY_DESC_ROLAND: Combining Imperterritus's toughness and Koschei's speed to produce the ultimate battle tank.
ENTITY_DESC_BRIMSTONE_BATTERY: Cutting edge thermobaric artillery capable of unleashing literal fire and brimstone upon the enemy.
ENTITY_DESC_WARMACHINE: A marvel of engineering, can fully produce other units on the go.
ENTITY_DESC_HUNTER_SUPPORT: The true jack-of-all-trades. It can do about anything.
ENTITY_DESC_INTREPID: Capable of capturing buildings, like shipyards and oil rigs. Mmmmm, oil...
ENTITY_DESC_U_BOAT: Contrary to popular belief, it does NOT deal extra damage to big ships.
ENTITY_DESC_LEVIATHAN_BARGE: A barge designed with only one purpose in mind: To transport units.
ENTITY_DESC_CORVETTE_FIGHTER: Big guns, strong armor, but still reasonably affordable. Great for tormenting land units.
ENTITY_DESC_BATTLESHIP: Bigger guns, bigger armor, bigger hull, bigger range. Bigger everything. MORE DAKKA! BIGGER DAKKA!
ENTITY_DESC_SUPER_BATTLESHIP: Over 50.000 tons of steel for the ultimate dakka.
ENTITY_DESC_RAPTOR_FIGHTER: Fast and furious, specialized in hunting other enemy planes.
ENTITY_DESC_EAGLE_STRIKER: Made with the specific purpose of trolling land units.
ENTITY_DESC_CONDOR_BOMBER: For when you feel that the Eagle Striker doesn't carry enough dakka.
ENTITY_DESC_SOLOVEY_BOMBER: A heavy, sluggish bomber with massive payload. Devastating against infrastructure and fortifications.
ENTITY_DESC_AKONTIO: According to the principle of cavitation, this plane fucks ships harder than Azur Lane players would.
ENTITY_DESC_ZEUS: Avant-garde technology, achieves much superior dogfighting and bombing results than any other plane.
ENTITY_DESC_STIHIE: Innovative plane design that maintains a very low radar signature while gunning down any enemy aircraft with advanced weaponry.
ENTITY_DESC_ALEPH: The supreme weapon; as destructive as it is terrifying. Will forever change the face of warfare.
ENTITY_DESC_STORK_TRANSPORT: Actually remarkable piece of engineering, capable of transporting some units via air.
ENTITY_DESC_TURRET: Capable of striking at land, sea and air units, the Turret is by far the most versatile fortification class.
ENTITY_DESC_BLOCKADE: Cheap and easy to erect static fortifications capable of delaying enemy advance for a short while.
ENTITY_DESC_BASTION: Static fortifications that will take the best of enemy bombardments and keep standing.
ENTITY_DESC_DEPOT: Storehouse of food, ammunitions and all supplies your troops need to function.
ENTITY_DESC_FORTRESS: A formidable citadel capable of holding back an army all by itself.
ENTITY_DESC_MEME_BUREAUCRAT: This specimen of fucking idiot shithead subhuman animal bitch goes to work at 10:00AM, scratches his ass until 12:00AM then leaves at 14:00AM. He will send you on an endless chase for approvals, signatures and requests, all the while acting so superior. Wtf is wrong with you, you dumb bitch? Don't you realize you can easily be replaced by a monkey with a typewritter? I yearn for the day when you are replaced by robots, and if that day does not come then all of humanity must join together and genocide all bureaucrats.
TRAIT_DESC_ENGINEER: This unit can construct obstacles and towers.
TRAIT_DESC_EXECUTIONER: This unit deals +50% damage against weakened enemies if it attacks first.
TRAIT_DESC_EXTRACTOR: This unit can extract resources from ore deposits.
TRAIT_DESC_HIGH_ALTITUDE: This unit can fly in restricted airspace.
TRAIT_DESC_UNFAIR: This unit can cloak anywhere. Truly unfair. (May also come with bugs)
TRAIT_DESC_BULLDOZE: This unit deals double damage if the enemy is at full health.
TRAIT_DESC_ANNIHILATE: This unit deals double damage if it is at full health.
TRAIT_DESC_SHRAPNEL: This unit deals 50% of damage to enemies 1 field behind its target.
TRAIT_DESC_CLEAR_SHOT: This unit can only fire in a straight line.
TRAIT_DESC_OVERHEAT: This unit loses 10% health every time it attacks.
TRAIT_DESC_TRACKING: This unit immediately attacks any enemy it uncovers.
TRAIT_DESC_SLUGGER: This unit always counters with full power.
TRAIT_DESC_JAMMER: This unit blocks air traffic and disables stealth.
TRAIT_DESC_ELUSIVE: This unit can move again if it has not attacked.
TRAIT_DESC_RADAR: This unit uncovers stealth units every turn.
TRAIT_DESC_STEALTH: This unit goes invisible after moving.
TRAIT_DESC_SUBMERGED: This unit cannot be attacked by most units.
TRAIT_DESC_COMMANDO: This unit is less impaired by logistical challenges and immune to terrain damage.
TRAIT_DESC_CRAB: This unit can cross water and land, but it is NOT a crab.
TRAIT_DESC_STEER: This unit receives less damage from heavy ships.
TRAIT_DESC_BLITZ: This unit deals +20% damage if it attacks first.
TRAIT_DESC_SCHWERPUNKT: This unit deals +40% damage against infantry if it attacks first.
TRAIT_DESC_BEWEGUNGSKRIEG: This unit can act again if a target was destroyed (up to once per turn).
TRAIT_DESC_STREAMLINED: This unit's movement is less impaired by terrain.
TRAIT_DESC_DISPERSION: This unit damages friend or foe in a 3x3 area.
TRAIT_DESC_LYNCHPIN: Keep at least one lynchpin alive to stay in the fight.
TRAIT_DESC_FIXED: This units survival does not prevent defeat.
TRAIT_DESC_STREAMBLAST: Strikes all foes in a direct line.
TRAIT_DESC_HEROIC: This unit cannot die, unless it is at 1HP.
TRAIT_DESC_TANK_HUNTER: This unit cannot be countered by tanks.
TRAIT_DESC_ABSORBER: Recovers HP based on damage dealt.
TRAIT_DESC_SUPPLY_DISTRIBUTION: Its action replenishes the strength of allied units
TRAIT_DESC_SPAWNER: This building can create new units.
TRAIT_DESC_NAVAL_TRANSPORT: Not a very fast method of transporting units, but it will carry anything.
TRAIT_DESC_AIR_TRANSPORT: The fastest transport, but can easily be shot down.
TRAIT_DESC_UNBUILT: This unit has not yet been constructed.
ARMOR_DESC_NONE: Receives 50% more damage from all weapons.
ARMOR_DESC_LIGHT: Receives 50% less damage from heavy weapons and 50% more from light weapons.
ARMOR_DESC_MEDIUM: Receives neutral damage from all weapons.
ARMOR_DESC_HEAVY: Receives 50% less damage from light weapons and 50% more from heavy weapons.
ARMOR_DESC_OMEGA: Receives 50% less damage from all weapons.
WEAPON_DESC_LIGHT: Deals 50% less damage to heavy armors and 50% more to light armors.
WEAPON_DESC_MEDIUM: Deals neutral damage to all armors.
WEAPON_DESC_HEAVY: Deals 50% less damage to light armors and 50% more to heavy armors.
CLIMATE_DESC_NONE: This is a bug and should be reported!
CLIMATE_DESC_TEMPERATE: Temperate climate, mild precipitations, nothing abnormal
CLIMATE_DESC_ARID: Hot and hostile, troops stationed here deal -25% damage
CLIMATE_DESC_BOREAL: Cold and hostile, troops stationed here deal -25% damage
CLIMATE_DESC_BARREN: Sweltering and unbearable, troops stationed here deal -50% damage
CLIMATE_DESC_ARCTIC: Frigid and unbearable, troops stationed here deal -50% damage
CLIMATE_DESC_LUNAR: Uninhabitable, troops stationed here deal -75% damage
CLIMATE_DESC_MARTIAN: Uninhabitable, troops stationed here deal -75% damage
CLIMATE_DESC_HELLISH: Uninhabitable, troops stationed here deal -90% damage
CURRENCY_DESC_NONE: This is a bug and should be reported!
MOVEMENT_DESC_WHEELED: Very fast but does not do well in rugged terrain
MOVEMENT_DESC_TRACKED: A good balance of speed and versatility
MOVEMENT_DESC_RAIL: This unit is restricted to railways
MOVEMENT_DESC_RUDDER: This unit is restricted to water
MOVEMENT_DESC_HEAVY_RUDDER: This unit is restricted to the open sea
MOVEMENT_DESC_AMPHIBIOUS: This unit can fight both on land and in shallow bodies of water
